credential.description: Credential configuration. Available properties depend on the selected CredentialSource.

CredentialSource.description: The credential type to use for authentication.

Subscription.description: The Azure subscription name or ID for Azure CLI.

AdditionallyAllowedTenants.description: Additional tenant IDs allowed for token acquisition. Use '*' for any tenant.

ProcessTimeout.description: Timeout for the credential process (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:00:30'). Default: 13 seconds.

ProcessTimeout.description: Timeout for the credential process (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:00:30'). Default: 10 seconds.

ProcessTimeout.description: Timeout for the credential process (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:00:30'). Default: 13 seconds.

ClientCertificatePath.description: The file path to a client certificate for authentication.

SendCertificateChain.description: Include the x5c header in client claims when using certificate authentication.

DisableInstanceDiscovery.description: Skip Microsoft Entra instance discovery and validation.

DisableInstanceDiscovery.description: Skip Microsoft Entra instance discovery and validation.

IsAzureProxyEnabled.description: Enable Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) proxy mode.

TokenFilePath.description: The path to the file containing the workload identity token.

AdditionallyAllowedTenants.description: Additional tenant IDs allowed for token acquisition. Use '*' for any tenant.

ManagedIdentityIdKind.description: The type of managed identity to use.

ManagedIdentityId.description: The user-assigned managed identity identifier (client ID, resource ID, or object ID depending on ManagedIdentityIdKind).

DisableInstanceDiscovery.description: Skip Microsoft Entra instance discovery and validation.

LoginHint.description: Pre-populate the username/email in the login prompt.

RedirectUri.description: The redirect URI for the OAuth callback.

Additional tenant IDs allowed for token acquisition. Use '*' for any tenant.

ProcessTimeout.description: Timeout for the credential process (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:00:30'). Default: 30 seconds.

DisableInstanceDiscovery.description: Skip Microsoft Entra instance discovery and validation.

AdditionallyAllowedTenants.description: Additional tenant IDs allowed for token acquisition. Use '*' for any tenant.

ServiceConnectionId.description: The Azure Pipelines service connection ID.

SystemAccessToken.description: The System.AccessToken value from the Azure Pipelines build.

ManagedIdentityIdKind.description: The type of user-assigned managed identity to use as the federated identity. SystemAssigned is not supported.

ManagedIdentityId.description: The user-assigned managed identity identifier (client ID, resource ID, or object ID depending on ManagedIdentityIdKind).

AzureCloud.description: The name of the Azure cloud where the managed identity is configured.

Sources.description: Ordered list of credential configurations to chain.

NetworkTimeout.description: Timeout for network operations (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:01:40').

clientLoggingOptions.description: Logging configuration for the client pipeline.

EnableMessageContentLogging.description: Enable logging of request and response body content.

MessageContentSizeLimit.description: Maximum size of logged message content in bytes.

AdditionalAllowedHeaderNames.description: Additional header names to log (appended to defaults). ⚠️ Avoid adding headers that may contain secrets (e.g., Authorization, Cookie, X-Api-Key) — these could leak sensitive data in logs.

AdditionalAllowedQueryParameters.description: Additional query parameter names to log (appended to defaults: api-version).

retry.description: Retry policy configuration for Azure SDK clients.

MaxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before giving up.

Delay.description: Initial delay between retries (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:00:00.8'). The delay increases with each retry when using Exponential mode. Default: 0.8 seconds.

MaxDelay.description: Maximum delay between retries (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:01:00'). Applies when the service does not provide a Retry-After header. Default: 1 minute.

Mode.description: The approach to use for calculating retry delays.

NetworkTimeout.description: Timeout applied to individual network operations (TimeSpan format, e.g. '00:01:40'). Default: 100 seconds.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostics configuration for Azure SDK clients.

ApplicationId.description: Application identifier appended to the User-Agent header.

IsTelemetryEnabled.description: Enable User-Agent telemetry header. Can also be disabled via the AZURE_TELEMETRY_DISABLED environment variable.

IsDistributedTracingEnabled.description: Enable distributed tracing activities (System.Diagnostics.Activity). Can also be disabled via the AZURE_TRACING_DISABLED environment variable.

IsLoggingContentEnabled.description: Enable logging of request and response body content.

LoggedContentSizeLimit.description: Maximum size of logged content in bytes.

AdditionalLoggedHeaderNames.description: Additional HTTP header names that are not redacted during logging (appended to defaults).

AdditionalLoggedQueryParameters.description: Additional query parameter names that are not redacted during logging (appended to defaults).

chainableCredential.description: A credential source in a chain. ApiKeyCredential and ChainedTokenCredential cannot be used.

CredentialSource.description: The token credential type. ApiKeyCredential and ChainedTokenCredential are not allowed in a chain.

ServiceConnectionId.description: The Azure Pipelines service connection ID.

SystemAccessToken.description: The System.AccessToken value from the Azure Pipelines build.

ManagedIdentityIdKind.description: The type of user-assigned managed identity to use as the federated identity. SystemAssigned is not supported.

ManagedIdentityId.description: The user-assigned managed identity identifier (client ID, resource ID, or object ID depending on ManagedIdentityIdKind).

AzureCloud.description: The name of the Azure cloud where the managed identity is configured.

Name.description: Name uniquely identifying the token cache to avoid conflicts.

UnsafeAllowUnencryptedStorage.description: Allow unencrypted storage when OS-level encryption is unavailable.

authenticationRecord.description: A record of a previous authentication. Enables silently authenticating a previously logged-in account.

Username.description: The user principal or service principal name.

Authority.description: The authority host used for authentication.

ClientId.description: The client application ID used for authentication.

browserCustomizationOptions.description: Options for customizing the interactive browser authentication experience.

SuccessMessage.description: The HTML content shown in the browser after successful authentication.

ErrorMessage.description: The HTML content shown in the browser after failed authentication.

AbortOnConnectFail.description: Gets or sets whether connect/configuration timeouts should be explicitly notified via a TimeoutException.

AllowAdmin.description: Indicates whether admin operations should be allowed.

AsyncTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that the system should allow for asynchronous operations (defaults to SyncTimeout).

UseImplicitAutoPattern.description: Indicates whether channels should use 'StackExchange.Redis.RedisChannel.PatternMode.Auto' when no 'StackExchange.Redis.RedisChannel.PatternMode' is specified; this is enabled by default, but can be disabled to avoid unexpected wildcard scenarios.

CheckCertificateRevocation.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether the certificate revocation list is checked during authentication.

ClientName.description: The client name to use for all connections.

ConfigCheckSeconds.description: Check configuration every n seconds (every minute by default).

ConfigurationChannel.description: Channel to use for broadcasting and listening for configuration change notification.

ConnectRetry.description: The number of times to repeat the initial connect cycle if no servers respond promptly.

ConnectTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that should be allowed for connection (defaults to 5 seconds unless SyncTimeout is higher).

DefaultDatabase.description: Specifies the default database to be used when calling 'StackExchange.Redis.ConnectionMultiplexer.GetDatabase(System.Int32,System.Object)' without any parameters.

HeartbeatConsistencyChecks.description: Whether to enable ECHO checks on every heartbeat to ensure network stream consistency. This is a rare measure to react to any potential network traffic drops ASAP, terminating the connection.

HeartbeatInterval.description: Controls how often the connection heartbeats. A heartbeat includes: - Evaluating if any messages have timed out. - Evaluating connection status (checking for failures). - Sending a server message to keep the connection alive if needed.

HighIntegrity.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether to use per-command validation of strict protocol validity. This sends an additional command after EVERY command which incurs measurable overhead.

IncludeDetailInExceptions.description: Whether exceptions include identifiable details (key names, additional .Data annotations).

IncludePerformanceCountersInExceptions.description: Whether exceptions include performance counter details.

KeepAlive.description: Specifies the time in seconds at which connections should be pinged to ensure validity. -1 Defaults to 60 Seconds.

LibraryName.description: Gets or sets the library name to use for CLIENT SETINFO lib-name calls to Redis during handshake. Defaults to "SE.Redis".

Password.description: The password to use to authenticate with the server.

Proxy.description: Type of proxy to use (if any); for example 'StackExchange.Redis.Proxy.Twemproxy'.

ResolveDns.description: Indicates whether endpoints should be resolved via DNS before connecting. If enabled the ConnectionMultiplexer will not re-resolve DNS when attempting to re-connect after a connection failure.

ServiceName.description: The service name used to resolve a service via sentinel.

SetClientLibrary.description: Gets or sets whether the library should identify itself by library-name/version when possible.

Ssl.description: Indicates whether the connection should be encrypted.

SslHost.description: The target-host to use when validating SSL certificate; setting a value here enables SSL mode.

SslProtocols.description: Configures which SSL/TLS protocols should be allowed.  If not set, defaults are chosen by the .NET framework.

SyncTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that the system should allow for synchronous operations (defaults to 5 seconds).

TieBreaker.description: Tie-breaker used to choose between primaries (must match the endpoint exactly).

User.description: The username to use to authenticate with the server.

ConfigurationOptions.description: The options relevant to a set of redis connections.

ConnectionString.description: Gets or sets the comma-delimited configuration string used to connect to the Redis server.

DisableAutoActivation.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether auto activation is disabled or not.

DisableHealthChecks.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the Redis health check is disabled or not.

DisableTracing.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

Redis.description: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a Redis server.

AccountEndpoint.description: A 'System.Uri' referencing the Azure Cosmos DB Endpoint. This is likely to be similar to "https://{account_name}.documents.azure.com".

ConnectionString.description: Gets or sets the connection string of the Azure Cosmos database to connect to.

ContainerName.description: Gets or sets the name of the container to connect to.

DatabaseName.description: Gets or sets the name of the database to connect to.

DisableTracing.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

Cosmos.description: The settings relevant to accessing Azure Cosmos DB.
